parameters.query:
-- Conta o status de processamento dos centros de custo
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_lines,
  SUM(CASE WHEN entries_runned = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as number_of_entries,
  SUM(CASE WHEN outputs_runned = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as number_of_outputs
FROM auxiliary.update_cc_report_status;

parameters.content:
## Arquitetura do Fluxo

Resume o estado global do processamento de CC.

Retorna:
- running
- total_lines
- number_of_entries
- number_of_outputs

## Agregacao no Banco

Consulta update_cc_report_status e calcula totais:
- linhas
- entries_runned
- outputs_runned

## Regra de Running

running = false somente quando:
- entries == total_lines
- e outputs == total_lines

Qualquer pendencia => running = true.
